# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  department: string;
  status: string;
  createdAt: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
}

// Helper to build KV keys dynamically from user input
function buildKey(parts: string[]): Deno.KvKey {
  return parts.filter((p) => p !== undefined && p !== null && p !== "");
}

// Seed some sample data for testing
async function seedData() {
  const users: User[] = [
    { id: "1", name: "Alice", email: "alice@example.com", role: "admin", department: "engineering", status: "active", createdAt: "2024-01-01" },
    { id: "2", name: "Bob", email: "bob@example.com", role: "user", department: "marketing", status: "active", createdAt: "2024-01-15" },
    { id: "3", name: "Charlie", email: "charlie@example.com", role: "user", department: "engineering", status: "inactive", createdAt: "2024-02-01" },
    { id: "4", name: "Diana", email: "diana@example.com", role: "moderator", department: "support", status: "active", createdAt: "2024-02-15" },
    { id: "5", name: "Eve", email: "eve@example.com", role: "admin", department: "engineering", status: "active", createdAt: "2024-03-01" },
  ];

  for (const user of users) {
    const atomic = kv.atomic();
    // Primary key: ['users', userId]
    atomic.set(["users", user.id], user);
    // Secondary indexes for efficient lookups
    atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_role_department", user.role, user.department, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_department_status", user.department, user.status, user.id], user);
    // Email unique index
    atomic.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user);
    await atomic.commit();
  }
}

// Get a single user by ID
async function getUser(userId: string): Promise<User | null> {
  const key = buildKey(["users", userId]);
  const result = await kv.get<User>(key);
  return result.value;
}

// Search users with flexible filter criteria
async function searchUsers(filters: Record<string, string>): Promise<User[]> {
  const { role, department, status, email, id, name, limit: limitStr, cursor } = filters;
  const limit = limitStr ? parseInt(limitStr, 10) : 100;

  // Direct lookup by ID
  if (id) {
    const user = await getUser(id);
    return user ? [user] : [];
  }

  // Direct lookup by email
  if (email) {
    const key = buildKey(["users_by_email", email]);
    const result = await kv.get<User>(key);
    return result.value ? [result.value] : [];
  }

  // Use the most specific index available
  let prefix: Deno.KvKey;

  if (role && department) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_role_department", role, department]);
  } else if (department && status) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_department_status", department, status]);
  } else if (role) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_role", role]);
  } else if (department) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_department", department]);
  } else if (status) {
    prefix = buildKey(["users_by_status", status]);
  } else {
    prefix = ["users"];
  }

  const listOptions: Deno.KvListOptions = { limit };
  if (cursor) {
    listOptions.cursor = cursor;
  }

  const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix }, listOptions);
  const users: User[] = [];

  for await (const entry of entries) {
    let user = entry.value;

    // Apply additional filters that aren't covered by the index
    if (role && department) {
      // Index covers role + department, still need to check status
      if (status && user.status !== status) continue;
    } else if (department && status) {
      // Index covers department + status, still need to check role
      if (role && user.role !== role) continue;
    } else if (role) {
      if (department && user.department !== department) continue;
      if (status && user.status !== status) continue;
    } else if (department) {
      if (role && user.role !== role) continue;
      if (status && user.status !== status) continue;
    } else if (status) {
      if (role && user.role !== role) continue;
      if (department && user.department !== department) continue;
    }

    // Name filter (case-insensitive partial match)
    if (name && !user.name.toLowerCase().includes(name.toLowerCase())) {
      continue;
    }

    users.push(user);
  }

  return users;
}

// Create or update a user with all indexes
async function upsertUser(user: User): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
  // If updating, remove old indexes first
  const existing = await getUser(user.id);
  
  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  
  if (existing) {
    // Clean up old secondary indexes if values changed
    if (existing.role !== user.role || existing.department !== user.department) {
      atomic.delete(["users_by_role", existing.role, existing.id]);
      atomic.delete(["users_by_department", existing.department, existing.id]);
      atomic.delete(["users_by_role_department", existing.role, existing.department, existing.id]);
      atomic.delete(["users_by_department_status", existing.department, existing.status, existing.id]);
    }
    if (existing.status !== user.status) {
      atomic.delete(["users_by_status", existing.status, existing.id]);
      atomic.delete(["users_by_department_status", existing.department, existing.status, existing.id]);
    }
    if (existing.email !== user.email) {
      atomic.delete(["users_by_email", existing.email]);
    }
  }

  // Set primary and all secondary indexes
  atomic.set(["users", user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_role_department", user.role, user.department, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_department_status", user.department, user.status, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user);

  const result = await atomic.commit();
  return { success: result.ok };
}

// Delete a user and all its indexes
async function deleteUser(userId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; found: boolean }> {
  const user = await getUser(userId);
  if (!user) {
    return { success: false, found: false };
  }

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.delete(["users", user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_role_department", user.role, user.department, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_department_status", user.department, user.status, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_email", user.email]);

  const result = await atomic.commit();
  return { success: result.ok, found: true };
}

// Dynamic key-value metadata storage per user
async function setUserMeta(userId: string, key: string, value: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }> {
  const metaKey = buildKey(["users", userId, "meta", key]);
  await kv.set(metaKey, value);
  return { success: true };
}

async function getUserMeta(userId: string, key?: string): Promise<Record<string, string>> {
  if (key) {
    const metaKey = buildKey(["users", userId, "meta", key]);
    const result = await kv.get<string>(metaKey);
    return result.value ? { [key]: result.value } : {};
  }

  // Get all metadata for a user
  const prefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users", userId, "meta"];
  const entries = kv.list<string>({ prefix });
  const meta: Record<string, string> = {};

  for await (const entry of entries) {
    const metaKey = entry.key[entry.key.length - 1] as string;
    meta[metaKey] = entry.value;
  }

  return meta;
}

// Flexible key query - build keys dynamically from arbitrary segments
async function dynamicKeyQuery(segments: string[]): Promise<unknown[]> {
  const key = buildKey(segments);
  
  // Try exact match first
  const exact = await kv.get(key);
  if (exact.value !== null) {
    return [exact.value];
  }

  // Fall back to prefix listing
  const entries = kv.list({ prefix: key }, { limit: 100 });
  const results: unknown[] = [];
  for await (const entry of entries) {
    results.push({
      key: entry.key,
      value: entry.value,
    });
  }
  return results;
}

function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
    },
  });
}

function errorResponse(message: string, status = 400): Response {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message }, status);
}

// Seed on startup
await seedData();

serve(async (req: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  // CORS preflight
  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, {
      headers: {
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
      },
    });
  }

  try {
    // GET / - API info
    if (path === "/" && method === "GET") {
      return jsonResponse({
        name: "Edge Database API",
        version: "1.0.0",
        endpoints: {
          "GET /users": "Search users with filters (?role=admin&department=engineering&status=active&name=alice&limit=10)",
          "GET /users/:id": "Get user by ID",
          "POST /users": "Create a new user",
          "PUT /users/:id": "Update a user",
          "DELETE /users/:id": "Delete a user",
          "GET /users/:id/meta": "Get all metadata for a user",
          "GET /users/:id/meta/:key": "Get specific metadata for a user",
          "PUT /users/:id/meta/:key": "Set metadata for a user",
          "POST /query": "Dynamic key query with arbitrary key segments",
          "POST /seed": "Re-seed sample data",
        },
      });
    }

    // POST /seed - Reseed data
    if (path === "/seed" && method === "POST") {
      await seedData();
      return jsonResponse({ message: "Data seeded successfully" });
    }

    // POST /query - Dynamic key query
    if (path === "/query" && method === "POST") {
      const body = await req.json();
      const segments: string[] = body.key || body.segments;
      if (!segments || !Array.isArray(segments)) {
        return errorResponse("Request body must contain 'key' or 'segments' array");
      }
      const results = await dynamicKeyQuery(segments);
      return jsonResponse({ query: segments, results, count: results.length });
    }

    // User metadata routes
    const metaMatch = path.match(/^\/users\/([^/]+)\/meta(?:\/([^/]+))?$/);
    if (metaMatch) {
      const userId = metaMatch[1];
      const metaKey = metaMatch[2];

      // Verify user exists
      const user = await getUser(userId);
      if (!user) {
        return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      }

      if (method === "GET") {
        const meta = await getUserMeta(userId, metaKey);
        return jsonResponse({ userId, meta });
      }

      if (method === "PUT" && metaKey) {
        const body = await req.json();
        const value = body.value;
        if (value === undefined) {
          return errorResponse("Request body must contain 'value'");
        }
        const result = await setUserMeta(userId, metaKey, String(value));
        return jsonResponse({ ...result, userId, key: metaKey, value: String(value) });
      }

      return errorResponse("Method not allowed", 405);
    }

    // GET /users - Search with filters
    if (path === "/users" && method === "GET") {
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
        filters[key] = value;
      }
      const users = await searchUsers(filters);
      return jsonResponse({
        filters,
        results: users,
        count: users.length,
      });
    }

    // GET /users/:id
    const userIdMatch = path.match(/^\/users\/([^/]+)$/);
    if (userIdMatch && method === "GET") {
      const userId = userIdMatch[1];
      const user = await getUser(userId);
      if (!user) {
        return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      }
      // Also fetch metadata
      const meta = await getUserMeta(userId);
      return jsonResponse({ ...user, metadata: meta });
    }

    // POST /users - Create user
    if (path === "/users" && method === "POST") {
      const body = await req.json();
      
      if (!body.id || !body.name || !body.email || !body.role || !body.department || !body.status) {
        return errorResponse("Missing required fields: id, name, email, role, department, status");
      }

      // Check if user already exists
      const existing = await getUser(body.id);
      if (existing) {
        return errorResponse("User with this ID already exists", 409);
      }

      const user: User = {
        id: body.id,
        name: body.name,
        email: body.email,
        role: body.role,
        department: body.department,
        status: body.status,
        createdAt: body.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      const result = await upsertUser(user);
      if (result.success) {
        return jsonResponse({ message: "User created", user }, 201);
      }
      return errorResponse("Failed to create user", 500);
    }

    // PUT /users/:id - Update user
    if (userIdMatch && method === "PUT") {
      const userId = userIdMatch[1];
      const existing = await getUser(userId);
      if (!existing) {
        return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      }

      const body = await req.json();
      const user: User = {
        id: userId,
        name: body.name || existing.name,
        email: body.email || existing.email,
        role: body.role || existing.role,
        department: body.department || existing.department,
        status: body.status || existing.status,
        createdAt: existing.createdAt,
      };

      const result = await upsertUser(user);
      if (result.success) {
        return jsonResponse({ message: "User updated", user });
      }
      return errorResponse("Failed to update user", 500);
    }

    // DELETE /users/:id
    if (userIdMatch && method === "DELETE") {
      const userId = userIdMatch[1];
      const result = await deleteUser(userId);
      if (!result.found) {
        return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      }
      if (result.success) {
        return jsonResponse({ message: "User deleted", userId });
      }
      return errorResponse("Failed to delete user", 500);
    }

    return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Error:", err);
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Internal server error";
    return errorResponse(message, 500);
  }
}, { port: 8000 });
